questions.question: Where does the author say our high priest is seated?
options: At the right hand of the throne of the Majesty in heaven
Before the ark of the covenant
At the gate of the temple
questions.correct: At the right hand of the throne of the Majesty in heaven
questions.feedback: Our high priest is seated at the right hand of the throne of the Majesty in heaven.

questions.question: The new covenant promises that God will put his laws where?
options: In their minds and on their hearts
questions.correct: In their minds and on their hearts
questions.feedback: God will put his laws in their minds and write them on their hearts.

questions.question: The author says the first covenant was faultless.
questions.feedback: If the first covenant had been faultless, there would have been no need for a second.

questions.question: By calling the covenant new, God has made the first one _____.
questions.feedback: By calling it new, God made the first covenant obsolete.

questions.question: The earthly priests serve at a sanctuary that is a copy and _____ of what is in heaven.
questions.feedback: They serve at a sanctuary that is a copy and shadow of the heavenly one.
